## Motivation

What problem would this solve? Whose pain does it address?

## Proposal

Sketch of the API or behavior.

## Design constraints (please confirm)

- [ ] No silent scalar collapse (`PolyphonicResult.to_scalar` default = `refuse`).
- [ ] No new Bakhtin/literary jargon in public function names.
- [ ] Schema version impact (none / minor / major):

## Alternatives considered

What else did you think about?
